tools.name: movscript_get_current_context
tools.description: Return current MovScript UI route, selected project, current user, selected project item, available project resources, and local draft count.

tools.name: movscript_list_projects
tools.description: List all visible projects as numbered Markdown summaries.

tools.name: movscript_read_project_scripts
tools.description: Read scripts in the current or specified project, optionally including script body text.

tools.name: movscript_create_project
tools.description: Create a formal MovScript project after user approval.

tools.name: movscript_search_memories
tools.description: Search local agent memories in the current project by query and optional kind, including older preferences, decisions, warnings, item references, and draft notes.

tools.name: movscript_get_memory
tools.description: Read one local agent memory by id in the current project.

tools.name: movscript_create_memory
tools.description: Create a local agent memory in the current project.

tools.name: movscript_delete_memory
tools.description: Delete one local agent memory in the current project.

tools.name: movscript_list_agent_bundles
tools.description: List locally available agent capability bundles, including their skill and tool references and whether they are enabled.

tools.name: movscript_inspect_agent_bundle
tools.description: Inspect one locally available agent capability bundle before enabling it.

tools.name: movscript_enable_agent_bundle
tools.description: Enable one locally available agent capability bundle. The refreshed skills and tools are available to subsequent agent runs.

tools.name: movscript_reload_agent_catalog
tools.description: Reload local agent skills, tools, and bundles from configured catalog directories.
